meaning: n.给食,喂,饲养,吃,输送adj.给食的,饲用的,逐渐强烈的,供给饲料的,摄取食物的
examples: There are many advantages to breast feeding.
They spend hours feeding on the ocean floor.
New fathers love bottle-feeding their babies.
After nearly a half-hour, we finally spot the elk feeding on a nearby ridge.
We would all be new to parenting, overwhelmed with feeding schedules and dizzy from sleep deprivation.
